title: memsprout — one shared brain for your team’s AI agents
excerpt: memsprout is the shared AI-context layer for teams. Each person captures what they know once; Spaces scope it; the MCP server pipes it into Cursor, Claude Code, Copilot, and ChatGPT — so your whole team's AI works from the same source of truth.
content_html:
Shared AI-context for teams

Every engineer, PM, and agent re-explains the same context all day. memsprout lets each person capture what they know once — then pipes it into Cursor, Claude Code, Copilot, and every MCP client, so your whole team’s AI works from the same source of truth.

Get started free See how it works

Connects to any MCP client · no copy-paste · live at mcp.memsprout.com

Works with the tools your team already uses
  • Claude Code
  • Cursor
  • GitHub Copilot
  • ChatGPT
  • Any MCP client

The context gap

Every agent on your team is working blind.

Context doesn’t cross teams

Product’s decisions never reach Dev’s agent. Dev’s gotchas never reach QA’s. Each AI knows only one person’s slice.

Rules files go stale

Three-to-five per-repo CLAUDE.md / .cursorrules files drift out of date the day after they’re written — and live in one repo, not across the team.

Everyone re-explains, all day

The same context gets pasted into a dozen chats a week. The knowledge dies in private history the moment the session ends.

How it works

Capture once. Every agent reads it.

  1. 01

    Capture

    Each person stores what they know as they work — decisions, gotchas, domain context. People type it; agents write it back through the same MCP tools. No separate wiki to maintain.

  2. 02

    Scope to a Space

    Memories live in Spaces with owner / editor / viewer roles. Scope context to a team or function — Platform, Product, QA — so the right brain reaches the right agents.

  3. 03

    Pipe into every agent

    Connect any MCP client to mcp.memsprout.com. From then on, every agent retrieves the same shared context — no copy-paste, no re-explaining, nothing going stale in a private chat log.

The model

One shape, everywhere: Space → Topic → Memory.

Three ideas carry the whole product. Once they click, every screen in memsprout reads the same way — for you and for every agent connected to it.

Memory

Everything you capture — a decision, a gotcha, a how-to — is one Memory. Type it yourself, or an agent writes it back for you.

Space

A Space scopes who can see a Memory: your own Personal Space, or a Shared Space with owner, editor, and viewer roles.

Topic

Inside a Space, Topics group related Memories — Auth, Onboarding, Billing — so retrieval stays sharp as the Space grows.

organization Acme

space Engineering Team

shared · the eng team

topic Conventions

memory Copy is sentence case, always.

memory Validate inputs at API boundaries.

topic Deploy & release

memory Ship to production on merge to main.

topic General · catch-all

space Project Aurora

shared · project group 3 topics

space Personal

private · just you 1 topic

How memsprout compares

Built for mixed AI stacks, not one vendor’s walled garden.

Claude-native memory only helps Claude. Wikis aren’t agent-native. Per-repo files don’t cross teams. memsprout is the one shared layer every agent can read.

memsproutContextCloudClaude-native memoryNotion / wikiPer-repo rules
Tool-agnostic (Cursor + Claude Code + Copilot)
Ambient capture — no “save this” command
Person-first: everyone maintains their own slice
Space roles (owner / editor / viewer)
Per-member attribution + provenance
Version history on every memory
Lands a single team — no enterprise minimum

full partial none

Trust & governance

Shared, without giving up control.

Space roles

Owner, editor, and viewer permissions apply identically to people and to AI clients.

Version history

Every memory is versioned. See what changed, who changed it, and roll back.

Provenance everywhere

Each memory carries a quiet marker of who captured it — a teammate, or an agent via MCP.

Auth at the data boundary

Row-level security enforces access in Postgres itself — the same rules for the app and every agent.

Pricing

14 days free. Then pick the plan that fits.

Individual

$10/ month

Your own memory and Spaces. Collaborate with anyone else who's on memsprout.

Start free trial
  • Unlimited personal Spaces
  • Connect any MCP client
  • Version history
  • Share with other members

Team

$15/ user · mo

One bill for the whole team. You add and pay for members — they just get access.

Start free trial
  • Everything in Individual, for everyone
  • Add teammates — you cover their seats
  • One invoice + admin controls
  • Priority support

Enterprise

Custom pricing for larger teams that need compliance, contracts, and dedicated support.

  • SSO / SAML
  • Audit logs
  • Custom data retention
  • 99.9% SLA
  • Custom contracts
  • Dedicated onboarding
  • Priority support
  • Unlimited seats

Contact sales

Give your team one shared brain.

Capture what you know once. Let every agent read it.

Get started free Sign in

Connect your first agent in about two minutes.

content_html_zh:
团队共享 AI 环境

每个工程师、PM 和代理整天都在重新解释相同的背景。 memsprout 让每个人捕获一次他们所知道的信息，然后将其传输到 Cursor、Claude Code、Copilot 和每个 MCP 客户端，这样整个团队的 AI 就可以从同一个事实来源工作。

免费开始看看它是如何工作的

连接到任何 MCP 客户端 · 无需复制粘贴 · 实时访问 mcp.memsprout.com

Works with the tools your team already uses
  • 克劳德·科德
  • 光标
  • GitHub 副驾驶
  • 聊天GPT
  • 任何 MCP 客户端

背景差距

您团队中的每个代理都在盲目工作。

上下文不跨团队

产品的决定永远不会到达开发人员的代理人手中。 开发人员的问题永远不会到达质量检查部门。 每个人工智能只知道一个人的份额。

规则文件过时

每个存储库有三到五个 CLAUDE.md / .cursorrules 文件在编写后的第二天就会过时 - 并且存在于一个存储库中，而不是跨团队。

整天大家都在重新解释

每周都会将相同的上下文粘贴到十几个聊天中。 会议结束后，这些知识就在私人历史中消失了。

它是如何运作的

捕捉一次。 每个特工都会阅读它。

  1. 01 捕获 每个人都存储他们在工作时所知道的信息——决策、陷阱、领域上下文。 人们输入它；代理通过相同的 MCP 工具将其写回。 无需维护单独的 wiki。
  2. 02 空间范围 记忆存在于空间中，具有所有者/编辑者/查看者角色。 确定团队或职能的范围背景（平台、产品、质量检查），以便右脑接触到正确的代理。
  3. 03 管道进入每个代理 将任何 MCP 客户端连接到 mcp.memsprout.com。 从那时起，每个代理都会检索相同的共享上下文 - 没有复制粘贴，没有重新解释，私人聊天日志中没有任何陈旧的内容。

型号

一种形状，无处不在：空间→主题→记忆。

三个想法承载着整个产品。 一旦它们点击，memsprout 中的每个屏幕都会以相同的方式读取 - 对于您和连接到它的每个代理。

记忆

你捕捉到的一切——一个决定、一个陷阱、一个操作方法——都是一个记忆。 您可以自己输入，或者由代理为您写回。

Space

可以查看内存的空间范围：您自己的个人空间，或具有所有者、编辑者和查看者角色的共享空间。

Topic

在空间内，主题组与记忆相关——身份验证、入职、计费——因此随着空间的发展，检索仍然保持敏锐。

组织Acme

空间工程团队

共享·工程团队

主题约定

记忆副本始终是句子大小写。

memsprout 比较如何

专为混合人工智能堆栈而构建，而不是某一供应商的围墙花园。

克劳德的本能记忆只会对克劳德有帮助。 Wiki 不是代理原生的。 每个存储库的文件不会跨团队。 memsprout 是每个代理都可以读取的共享层。
